Describe the sequence of actions the gymnast performs from preparing her equipment to beginning her routine on the uneven bars.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the gymnast adjusts white wrist guards near the blue mat; at 4s, she holds a white chalk block behind the metal pole; at 10s, she lowers her arms from overhead to her sides; at 14s, she starts swinging on the high bar of the uneven bars apparatus.
